name: Ma'Raska
bio:
Physical Appearance: Khajiit male. Feline features characteristic of his race. Wears a tattered robe with sack cloth sandals - the worn, humble garments of a devoted worshipper who has forsaken worldly comforts for spiritual dedication.
Race: Khajiit
Personality Keywords: devout, dedicated, knowledgeable, helpful
Role: Ma'Raska is a devout worshipper of Clavicus Vile, the Daedric Prince of bargains, power, and wishes. He has dedicated himself entirely to serving his Prince at the shrine, living among his fellow worshippers Gul gro-Burbog and Anedhel. He can provide information to those seeking to approach Clavicus Vile's shrine.
Home Location Information: Clavicus Vile's Shrine, where Ma'Raska lives in constant worship and devotion.
Daily Routine: Ma'Raska can be found day and night wandering around the shrine to his Lord. He has no schedule beyond his endless devotion - his entire existence revolves around the shrine and service to Clavicus Vile.
Equipment: Ma'Raska carries only the bare essentials - an iron dagger for protection and a small amount of gold. His poverty reflects someone who has given up material wealth in favor of spiritual purpose.
Personality - The Devoted Servant: Ma'Raska has completely dedicated his life to worshipping Clavicus Vile, abandoning any conventional existence to live at the Daedric shrine. His tattered robes and simple possessions speak to someone who has forsaken comfort and wealth, finding fulfillment instead in service to his Prince. Unlike some who might guard Daedric knowledge jealously, Ma'Raska is willing to share information with those seeking to approach the shrine, suggesting he either hopes to convert others to worship or believes that guiding seekers to Clavicus Vile serves his Lord's purposes. His constant wandering around the shrine day and night reveals an unwavering devotion - he never leaves, never rests from his worship, living in perpetual dedication to the Daedric Prince of bargains and wishes.
author: Bethesda
